subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Kingdom! Thy letter was received, and from its contents it became evident that thou art firm and steadfast to the utmost degree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت در ملکوت نامه ات رسید و از مضمون معلوم گردید که در نهایت ثبوت و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity
